citeinfo.title: Data Compiled on historical water use, spatial land disturbance, aquifer disturbance and uranium produced by In Situ Recovery of Uranium from Sandstone Hosted Uranium Deposits in the South Texas Coastal Plain, USA
Water Use, Surface Areas and Aquifer Volumes Affected and Radon Releases During In-Situ Recovery of Uranium from Sandstone Hosted Uranium Deposits in the South Texas Coastal Plain, USA

descript.abstract: This data release contains data on historical water use, spatial land disturbance, and spatial aquifer disturbances related to in situ recovery (ISR) uranium extraction per unit of uranium produced. These data were compiled from published and publicly available references including journal articles, government reports, industry reports and company reporting documents for regulatory compliance and financial reporting requirements. Six uranium ISR mines are represented: Alta Mesa, Kingsville Dome, Mt. Lucas, Palangana, Palangana Dome, and Rosita.
descript.purpose: These data were compiled to understand historical water use, spatial land disturbance, and spatial aquifer disturbances related to in situ recovery uranium extraction per unit of uranium produced.
descript.supplinf:
There are six data files and references file in this data release: MinePermits.csv - Table of permits associated with ISR operations in the Goliad Formation, Texas. TexasISROperations.csv - Table of information about selected ISR operations in Texas. AreaInformation.csv - Table of area information for selected mine production area authorizations. AquiferExemptions.csv - Table of aquifer exemptions for selected mines. DisposalVolumes.csv - Table of fluid volumes injected into class I deep disposal wells for Goliad Formation, Texas. Restoration.csv - Table of volumes of water extracted for restoration in selected mines. CitationsSources.csv - Full source references for data contained in the six data files.
References used to construct the data set are provided. Users are encouraged to find the original documents.

idinfo.accconst: None. Please see 'Distribution Info' for details.
idinfo.useconst: None. Users are advised to read the dataset's metadata thoroughly to understand appropriate use and data limitations.
idinfo.datacred: We gratefully acknowledge the support of staff at the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality including David Murry, Fred Duffy, Maryanne Ryan, Tony Gonzalez, Bobby Janecka, Richard Heitzenrater, June Demas and others. We also thank valuable insightful discussions with Texas mining industry representatives including Mark Pelizza and Peter Luthiger. We also thank EPA representatives including Jill Dean from the Office of Ground Water and Drinking Water for assistance in acquiring and checking data related to the aquifer exemptions and Jose Eduardo Torres with the EPA Region 6 for helpful discussions on Class I disposal wells in Texas. Ingrid Rosencrantz with EPA’s Office of Air and Radiation for help with identifying industry documentation regarding water use in ISR.

citeinfo.title: Permit to conduct underground injection under provision of Chapter 26, Texas Water Code, Permit No. UR02381

dataqual.complete: Data represent historical information only for the six selected uranium ISR mines. Not all data sources were found for every ISR operation for every year. Keep in mind that also the reports are often piecemeal and at times, as the operations grows or scales back, the data could also change accordingly.

procstep.procdesc: Data for all tables were compiled from extensive review of existing mining documents.

enttyp.enttypd: Comma Separated Value (CSV) file containing information for permits associated with ISR operations in the Goliad Formation, Texas.

attr.attrdef: Name of in situ recovery operation

attrdomv.udom: Name of the mine operation.

attr.attrdef: Code associated with the in situ recovery uranium mine permit and class III underground injection well

attrdomv.udom: Class III permit number as assigned by the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality.

attr.attrdef: Remark column for Class_III_PermitNo field.

attrdomv.udom: Remarks for the Class_III_PermitNo field.

attr.attrdef: The short citation for the documentation for the information provided

attrdomv.udom: The short citation for the information provided.

attr.attrdef: Code associated with the Class I underground deep underground injection disposal well

attrdomv.udom: Class I permit number as assigned by the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality.

attr.attrdef: Remark column for Class_I_PermitNo field.

attrdomv.udom: Remarks for the Class_III_PermitNo field.

attr.attrdef: The short citation for the documentation for the information provided

attrdomv.udom: The short citation for the information provided.

enttyp.enttypd: Comma Separated Value (CSV) file containing information about selected ISR operations in Texas. Notes for the table: (1) Alta Mesa: Only PAA-1 has been restored to date so the uranium in PAA-1 produced is evaluated for restoration; the balance od disposal is assumed due to mining and compared to total production (2) Kingsville Dome: Production includes all PAAs. (3) Rosita (PAA1, PAA2) produced (PAA3, PAA4 not produced as of 2016) (4) Palangana Dome: operations before July 1994; Ammonium based lixiviant may have impacted volumes of water used for restoration

attr.attrdef: The name of the in situ recovery operation

attrdomv.udom: The name of the in situ recovery operation

attr.attrdef: The short citation for the documentation used for the information provided.

attrdomv.udom: The short citation for the information provided.

attr.attrdef: The year or range of years during which uranium was produced (not including restoration)

attrdomv.udom: The year or range of years during which uranium was produced.

attr.attrdef: The rate of flow of solutions from ISR operation into processing plant
The percentage of uranium in the deposit, reported as percent uranium oxide

attrdomv.udom: Percentage of uranium oxide in the deposit.

attr.attrdef: Remarks and short citations for the Grade_U3O8 data

attrdomv.udom: Remarks and short citations for the Grade_U3O8 data

attr.attrdef: The mass of uranium produced, reported in pounds of uranium oxide
The recovery factor or the amount of uranium extracted relative to the amount of uranium thought to be present
Remarks and short citations for the AvgRecFactor data.

attrdomv.udom: Remarks and citations for the AvgRecFactor data.

attr.attrdef: The minimum recovery factor or the amount of uranium extracted relative to the amount of uranium thought to be present
The maximum recovery factor or the amount of uranium extracted relative to the amount of uranium thought to be present
The concentration of the chemical used to oxidize the uranium in the leaching solution or lixiviant (O₂=oxygen gas, H₂O₂=hydrogen peroxide), reported as parts per million
Remarks and short citation for the Oxidant data. H₂O₂ indicates hydrogen peroxide)

attrdomv.udom: Remarks and short citation for the Oxidant data.

attr.attrdef: The chemical used to chemically complex the uranium in the leaching solution or lixiviant (NaHCO₃=sodium bicarbonate; HCO₃⁻=bicarbonate, Na₂CO₃=sodium carbonate, (NH₄)₂CO₃=ammonium carbonate reported in mg/L=milligrams per liter or g/L=grams per liter

attrdomv.udom: The chemical used to chemically complex the uranium in the leaching solution or lixiviant.

attr.attrdef: Remarks and short citations for the Leachant data.

attrdomv.udom: Remarks and short citations for the Leachant data.

attr.attrdef: The mineral form of uranium present in the deposit

attrdomv.udom: The mineral form of uranium present in the deposit

attr.attrdef: Remarks and short citations for the Mineral data.

attrdomv.udom: Remarks and short citations for the Mineral data.

attr.attrdef: Concentration of the uranium dissolved into solution resulting from the ISR operation that is sent to the plant for processing.

enttyp.enttypd: Comma Separated Value (CSV) file containing area information for selected mine production area authorizations.

attr.attrdef: The production area authorization name

attrdomv.udom: Name of the production area authorization.

attr.attrdef: Short citations for the documentation used for the information.

attrdomv.udom: Citations for the information provided.

attr.attrdef: The production area is the line drawn outer perimeter of injection and recovery wells used for mining (for example, see TCEQ, 1981) (for example, see Texas Commission on Environmental Quality (January 12, 1981).
Wellfield Area or area under pattern
Mine area by the line drawn through the ring of monitoring wells.
Remarks for the mine area data

attrdomv.udom: Remarks for the mine area data

attr.attrdef: The area owned or under lease by the permittee which includes the buffer areas, mine areas and production areas
The lease area is the largest boundary and refers to the acreage leased

enttyp.enttypd: Comma Separated Value (CSV) file containing information about aquifer exemptions for selected mines.

attr.attrdef: Name of the mine

attrdomv.udom: Name of the mine

attr.attrdef: Remarks and short citation for the mine information

attrdomv.udom: Remarks for the mine information

attr.attrdef: The ratio of the volume of interconnected pore spaces to the total volume of material, expressed as a percent

attrdomv.udom: The ratio of the volume of interconnected pore spaces to the total volume of material.

attr.attrdef: Short citation for the porosity data

attrdomv.udom: Short citation for the porosity data

attr.attrdef: Capacity of a porous material for transmitting a fluid
Short citation for the permeability data

attrdomv.udom: Short citation for the permeability data

attr.attrdef: The aerial extent of the exempted aquifer
The thickness of the exempted aquifer
Short citations for the mine information

attrdomv.udom: Short citation for the mine information

attr.attrdef: The sum of all the substances, organic and inorganic, dissolved in water, in milligrams per liter
Short citation for the dissolved solids data

attrdomv.udom: Short citation for the dissolved solids data

attr.attrdef: Product of the Exempted Thickness x the Exempted Area
Product of the Exempted Volume and Effective Porosity * Unit conversion (325,851.43 gallons / ac-ft)

enttyp.enttypd: Comma Separated Value (CSV) file containing data for fluid volumes injected into class I deep disposal wells for Goliad Formation, Texas.

attr.attrdef: Name of mine

attrdomv.udom: Name of mine

attr.attrdef: Remarks for the information from the mine

attrdomv.udom: Remarks for the information from the mine

attr.attrdef: Short citations for the mine information

attrdomv.udom: Short citations for the mine information

attr.attrdef: The permit number assigned to the well

attrdomv.udom: The permit number assigned to the well

attr.attrdef: Beginning date of disposal records found
Remarks for the start date

attrdomv.udom: Remarks for the start date

attr.attrdef: End date of disposal records found
Volume of water Injected Into the disposal well based on found records. Not all records were located, therefore this number represents the minimum amount of water disposed.
Depth of well completion, in feet
Remarks for depth data

attrdomv.udom: Remarks for depth data

attr.attrdef: Formation in which well was completed

attrdomv.udom: Formation in which well was completed

attr.attrdef: Short citation for the formation data

attrdomv.udom: Short citation for the formation data

attr.attrdef: Name of company that owns the well

attrdomv.udom: Name of company that owns the well

attr.attrdef: Location of Company

attrdomv.udom: Location of Company

attr.attrdef: Short citation for the company information

attrdomv.udom: Short citation for the company information

attr.attrdef: County in which the well was drilled

attrdomv.udom: County in which the well was drilled

enttyp.enttypd: Comma Separated Value (CSV) file containing data for volumes of water extracted for restoration in selected mines.

attr.attrdef: Name of mine

attrdomv.udom: Name of mine

attr.attrdef: Remarks for mine information

attrdomv.udom: Remarks for mine information

attr.attrdef: Short citation for the mine information

attrdomv.udom: Short citation for the mine information

attr.attrdef: Production Area Authorization name tied to the permit

attrdomv.udom: Production Area Authorization name tied to the permit

attr.attrdef: Volume within pore spaces of the mine zone
Remarks for the pore volume data

attrdomv.udom: Remarks for the pore volume data

attr.attrdef: Volume of water extracted for restoration
Remarks for the volume data

attrdomv.udom: Remarks for the volume data

attr.attrdef: Volume of water injected for restoration
Remarks for the injection water volume

attrdomv.udom: Remarks for the injection water volume

attr.attrdef: Method of disposal of water extracted, but not reinjected. If deep well disposal is employed and the well name is known, the name of the well is provided. Other methods include land application. WDW is the designation for the deep well. RO is reverse osmosis, GW Sweep is a method whereby water is extracted from the aquifer and sent to disposal without treatment.

attrdomv.udom: Method of disposal of water extracted, but not reinjected (disposed)

attr.attrdef: Volume of water extracted but not reinjected
Start date of restoration records found
End date of restoration records found
Number of days of restoration accounted for in the records found. End date minus start date.
Percentage of water treated but not reinjected (disposed) of the total amount extracted
The number of pore volumes disposed during the restoration period

enttyp.enttypd: Comma Separated Value (CSV) file containing citation and reference information.

attr.attrdef: The name of the table in which the reference is cited

attrdomv.udom: The name of the table in which the reference is cited

attr.attrdef: Shortened version of the citation used in the data tables

attrdomv.udom: Short citation

attr.attrdef: The full reference for the source documentation

attrdomv.udom: The full reference for the source documentation

cntaddr.address: Denver Federal Center, Building 810, Mail Stop 302

distinfo.distliab: Unless otherwise stated, all data, metadata and related materials are considered to satisfy the quality standards relative to the purpose for which the data were collected. Although these data and associated metadata have been reviewed for accuracy and completeness and approved for release by the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS), no warranty expressed or implied is made regarding the display or utility of the data on any other system or for general or scientific purposes, nor shall the act of distribution constitute any such warranty. Any use of trade, firm, or product names is for descriptive purposes only and does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Government.
distinfo.techpreq: The file contains data available in comma separated value (.csv) file format. The user must have software capable of opening and viewing a .csv file.

cntperp.cntorg: U.S. Geological Survey, ROCKY MOUNTAIN REGION

metainfo.metstdn: Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
